plantText.turnip-default-description: Just a regular turnip. Has an average of 34 calories. The tops turn purple because they are exposed to the sun.
plantText.turnip-blue-description: Almost like a regular turnip... except blue! What do we call it? Let's just call it a blurnip, and figure out a better name later
plantText.turnip-red-description: A bright red turnip with an earthy hue. It gains it's crimson color from killing it's siblings and absorbing their blood
plantText.turnip-gold-description: This turnip is made of actual gold!  That's right, not only is it inedible, it also weighs an average of 30 pounds!
plantText.tomato-default-description: Some say tomato, some say tomahto. However you say it, over 3700 people died in California last year from motor vehicle related causes.
plantText.tomato-blue-description: Just like a regular tomato, except this unfortunate tomato has clinical depression. I bet he wish he brought his towel
plantText.tomato-white-description: This tomato used to be a regular tomato, but now he's scared. Why is he scared? He heard about the motor vehicles thing from the regular tomato
plantText.tomato-gold-description: Lucky Lucky! Did you know that the tomato is the lucky fruit of literally NO cultures that I could google? You'd think after being the demon fruit for so long, people would consider themselves lucky for not dying eating them.
